vocab.meaning: nơi mình thấy thoải mái như ở nhà
vocab.example: During those long summer trips, our family car felt like a home from home, filled with my favorite toys and snacks.
Whenever my father announced a road trip to the coast, I would be on cloud nine for the entire week leading up to it.

vocab.meaning: một thành tựu đáng tự hào (ở đây là việc đi được xa)
vocab.example: To my young mind, having traveled to the far north by car was quite a feather in my cap among my school friends.

vocab.word: lull someone into a false sense of security
vocab.ipa: /lʌl ˈsʌmwʌn ˈɪntu ə fɔːls sens əv sɪˈkjʊərəti/
vocab.meaning: khiến ai đó lơ là/ngủ quên trong sự an tâm (nghĩa bóng về sự êm ái của xe)
vocab.example: The smooth suspension would lull me into a false sense of security, and I’d often wake up surprised to find we’d already arrived.

vocab.meaning: làm cho cả nhà cười nghiêng ngả/phấn khích
vocab.example: My siblings and I used to perform silly car karaoke sessions that would absolutely bring the house down and keep us entertained.

vocab.meaning: cho phép ai đó tự do làm điều mình thích
vocab.example: My parents usually gave me free rein to choose the music or the snacks, which made the car journey much more enjoyable.

vocab.meaning: thế giới mở rộng trước mắt/mọi thứ đều có thể
vocab.example: Sitting in the passenger seat and watching the horizon, I truly felt like the world was my oyster and we could go anywhere.

vocab.meaning: giữ cho ai đó lạc quan (khi đi đường quá dài)
vocab.example: When the traffic got heavy, my mom would tell stories to keep our chins up and prevent us from getting grumpy.

vocab.word: take the wind out of someone's sails
vocab.ipa: /teɪk ðə wɪnd aʊt əv ˈsʌmwʌnz seɪlz/
vocab.meaning: làm ai đó mất hứng/hụt hẫng
vocab.example: A sudden car breakdown would occasionally take the wind out of our sails, but it usually just added to the adventure.

vocab.meaning: trong môi trường yêu thích/như cá gặp nước
vocab.example: I was really in my element during car journeys, armed with a comic book and a pair of headphones for hours on end.
